command: sudo systemctl stop gitea; grep RUN_USER /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini; sudo sed -i "s/^RUN_USER.*/RUN_USER = jose/" /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini; grep RUN_USER /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini; sudo systemctl start gitea && sleep 8 && systemctl is-active gitea && ss -tlnp | grep 3000 && echo GITEA_LIVE
